productDisplayName: Fila Men Paramount Plus White Shoes
description: fila specialises in high-quality sport footwear. The pair showcases the brand's versatility and ensures maximum style and comfort. Make these shoes from fila your item du jour and wear them with jeans and a light hued tee.UpperSynthetic leather upper with strategically placed overlays and perforated on the backfoot for absolute breathable comfortStitch detailing for stylePadded tongue and collar for snug, customised comfortLace-up system for a snug, customised FitMidsolePU midsole for lightweight comfortFabric footbed for sweat-free wearOutsoleTPR outsole with gum rubber lugs in concentric semi-circles around the pivot points on the forefoot and backfoot for absolute grip, durability and easy turning of the feetshoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
